hero.headline: told beautifully.
hero.description: ELB Creative is a full-service creative studio offering copywriting, content strategy, social media, photography, web design, and more. One studio, everything your brand needs.

about.text: I'm Anna — a writer, content strategist, and creative professional with a background in English literature, lifestyle media, and real estate marketing. I started ELB Creative to offer brands a single trusted studio for all their creative needs — from copy to photography to web design and beyond.
about.quote: Great creative work doesn't just look good — it makes people feel something.
